item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-15 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] HKUDS/Vibe-Trading (+1280 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: "Vibe-Trading: Your Personal Trading Agent" Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1280，总 stars 22,996，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] Graphify-Labs/graphify (+1905 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +1905，前 3 日均值 911.3，加速度 2.1x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] HKUDS/nanobot (+175 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +175，前 3 日均值 64，加速度 2.7x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+591 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +591，总 stars 56,357，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] calesthio/OpenMontage (+564 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +564，总 stars 38,581，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] santifer/career-ops (+255 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Workflow Automation Description: Open-source AI job search: scan job portals, score listings A-F, tailor your CV, track applications — runs locally in your AI coding CLI (Claude Code, Gemini, Codex, OpenCode…) Why it matters: AI Workflow Automation 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +255，前 3 日均值 109.7，加速度 2.3x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+376 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 🎨 The open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Local-first desktop app. 🖼️ Your coding agent becomes the design engine: prototypes, landing pages, dashboards, slides, images & video — real files, HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export. 🤖 Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen & 20+ CLIs via BYOK.
